resid_std_mod3 = (ussteamco_mod_3.resid - 
ussteamco_mod_3.resid.mean()) / 
ussteamco_mod_3.resid.std(ddof=1)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 5))
qqplot(resid_std_mod3, line='45', fit=True, ax=ax, 
color='#00338D', alpha=0.8)
ax.set_title('QQ Plot of Standardized Residuals (mod.3)')
ax.set_xlabel('Theoretical Quantiles')
ax.set_ylabel('Standardized Residuals')
ax.grid(alpha=0.25)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
\end{Verbatim}
